findings: Commander launch profile is explicit: SS-250, 50 squad leads × 5 workers = 250 leaf workers, per_commander_full_swarm=true.
Premium model policy is explicit: 10-model premium pool required for every Squad Lead and Worker launch; no implicit/default model allowed.
Banned model enforcement is explicit: 4 models banned; fallback to a banned model must produce partial status and a violation report.
No silent downgrade policy is explicit: partial if circuit breaker/timeout/cost ceiling prevents full launch; failed if zero squad leads launched.
Collaboration bus creation is not mentioned in the commander agent contract.
Sub-agent telemetry and launch proof are fully specified via swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl schemas.
Depth Guard and leaf-node lock are explicit, including the required DO NOT use the task tool block.
Stop/recovery behavior is limited to retry_budget=1; no detailed restart procedure is defined.
